parameters.features: K, V at '=' position, expression-mean embedding, token embedding

key_finding: Expression-embed retroactive baseline on Qwen: V R=0.977 (replicates 0.975), expr-embed R=0.771, V-expr gap=+0.206. Gap narrows from +0.867 (over token-embed) but remains SUBSTANTIAL — 1.65x larger than Mistral's +0.125. Permutation p=0.000 for V, K, expr-embed; p=0.936 for token-embed. KV carries computation BEYOND what expression tokens encode. 7/9 pre-registered predictions confirmed.
evidence_impact: Computation-position finding survives the stronger expression-embed baseline. Downgraded from 'decisive' to 'moderate-strong': the +0.206 V-expr gap is meaningful but not the +0.867 originally claimed. Dimensionality advantage: KV (dim=640-1024) outperforms expr-embed (dim=2560) with 2.5x fewer features. First permutation significance tests in the program — all key probes overwhelmingly significant.
next_planned: Paraphrase disruption (Experiment B). Early-answer decodability with expression-embed methodology. Hidden-state baseline at expression positions (even stronger text baseline). Complete paired permutation test.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: EXPRESSION-EMBED TESTED + PERMUTATION SIGNIFICANCE: V R=0.977 on Qwen with expr-embed R=0.771 → V-expr gap +0.206 (moderate-strong). Mistral V-expr gap +0.125 (moderate). Perm p=0.000 for V,K,expr. Effect encoding-dependent but statistically robust on both models.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: 2 families for general decodability + computation-position + expression-embed baseline. Both models: KV > expr-embed > token-embed.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + geometric evidence + Phase 2 computation-position effect depends on encoding type.
